mapper.delete: DELETE FROM WISHLIST WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND BOOK_ID = #{bookId}
mapper.select: SELECT W.ID, W.CUSTOMER_ID, W.BOOK_ID, W.CREATED_AT, B.BOOK_NAME, B.PUBLISHER_HOUSE, B.PRICE, B.BOOK_OWNER_ID, U.NAME AS BOOK_OWNER_NAME, BOP.NICKNAME AS BOOK_OWNER_NICKNAME, CC_GENRE.CODE_NAME AS GENRE_NAME, CC_LOC.CODE_NAME AS LOCATION_NAME FROM WISHLIST W JOIN BOOK B ON W.BOOK_ID = B.ID JOIN USERS U ON B.BOOK_OWNER_ID = U.ID JOIN BOOK_CASE BC ON B.BOOK_CASE_ID = BC.ID LEFT JOIN BOOK_OWNER_PROFILE BOP ON B.BOOK_OWNER_ID = BOP.BOOK_OWNER_ID LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE CC_GENRE ON CC_GENRE.GROUP_CODE = 'BOOK_TYPE' AND CC_GENRE.CODE = B.COMMON_CODE_ID LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE CC_LOC ON CC_LOC.GROUP_CODE = 'LOCATION' AND CC_LOC.CODE = BC.COMMON_CODE_ID WHERE W.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND B.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY W.CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WISHLIST WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND BOOK_ID = #{bookId}
